verification.method: GitHub contents API write followed by repository fetch

observed: Canonical project identity and continuity-mining responsibility are present in CURRENT_STATE.json.
inferred: Unnormalized aliases can fragment project memory.
proposed: Feel and think are distinct, composable interpretive operations.
superseded: All surface-form variants should create separate project nodes.
unresolved: Historical aliases and first-use dates remain incomplete.
A previously reported language lexicon was not found at its expected repository path.

privacy_boundary: Only project-level abstractions were committed; raw private conversation and sensitive material were excluded.
limits: No raw chat-history corpus was committed or indexed.
The semantic convention is a project interaction contract, not a scientific claim about consciousness or human cognition.
ACTIVE_QUEUE.json was not overwritten during this slice; completion is recorded additively in a queue-update artifact to avoid clobbering concurrent team state.
falsification_route: Run ambiguous alias counterexamples and paired feel/think prompt tests; revise or reject definitions that do not produce stable, materially distinct behavior.
